home_intro: Modern digital solutions for companies that want to be visible, efficient and successful online.
home_text: SoftMaster creates custom websites, improves your visibility on Google and builds a strong digital identity for your business. Our solutions are fast, secure, responsive and perfectly tailored to your needs. From web design and SEO to branding and custom tools – we combine technology with creativity to deliver lasting results.
home_slogan: Your idea. Our technology. Your success.
webdesign_intro: Modern websites for your digital success
service_web_details: We create modern, fast and responsive websites that work perfectly on all devices – from smartphones to large desktop screens. Our websites automatically adapt to screen size, language and light or dark mode. We avoid heavy website builders and use clean, optimized code tailored specifically to your business needs.
webdesign_list: Custom web design based on your brand identity
Secure contact & reservation systems with captcha
Digital business cards & QR code systems
SEO-friendly structure for better Google ranking
Modern animations and interactive user experience
webdesign_outro: From simple company websites to complex web platforms – we build custom, efficient and future-proof solutions.
webdesign_slogan: You have the vision. We deliver the solution.
service_seo_intro: Better visibility on Google for your business.
service_seo_details: With our SEO optimization, we make sure your business is easier to find on Google – exactly where your customers are searching. We analyze your website, improve content, structure and technology, and optimize everything for search engines and real users. We also focus on local visibility so your business appears prominently on Google Maps and regional search results.
service_seo_list: Integration with social media & review platforms
service_seo_outro: SEO is not a one-time task – it’s a long-term strategy. We create a customized SEO plan that brings more visitors, inquiries and customers over time.
service_seo_slogan: Better rankings. More traffic. Real results.
service_branding_details: We create custom logos and build strong visual identities for your company. Your design is tailored to your industry, target audience and personal vision. We focus on modern trends, clean shapes and strong recognizability – optimized for websites, social media and digital platforms. Every detail is carefully crafted to ensure your brand looks professional, trustworthy and unique.
service_branding_intro: A professional visual identity for your business.
service_branding_list: Custom logo design based on your brand identity
Color schemes and typography matching your brand
Design for websites and social media profiles
Branding for digital business cards and online presence
Redesign and optimization of existing logos
Consulting on brand impact and target audience perception
service_branding_outro: Strong design builds trust, differentiates you from competitors and stays in your customers’ minds.
service_branding_slogan: Your presence. Your brand. Your style.
service_print_text: Business cards, shirts, safety vests, stamps.
service_print_intro: Professional design for your promotional and business materials.
service_print_details: We create high-quality designs for your promotional materials and business equipment to strengthen your brand visually. From business cards to clothing and advertising materials, each design is tailored to your company’s identity. We focus on colors, layout and details to ensure your printed products look professional and leave a lasting impression. We also prepare print-ready files and assist with ordering from printing companies so everything fits perfectly.
service_print_list_title: Our promotional & print design services include:
service_print_list: Design of business cards, flyers and brochures
Design for company clothing such as shirts and safety vests
Design of stamps, folders and business documents
Creation of menus, stickers and advertising signs
Print-ready files for professional printing companies
Support with ordering and production coordination
service_print_outro: Consistent design builds recognition, trust and a strong presence for your business – online and offline.
project_smt_desc: SMT Zone is a specialized online platform featuring one of the largest vehicle databases for tunable engines – from cars to trucks and agricultural vehicles. Users can search by brand, model and engine and access detailed technical data about engine performance, ECU systems and possible optimization methods such as chip tuning. The platform serves both end users for research and professional service providers as an advertising and integration solution. SMT Zone does not perform tuning itself – it provides the technical foundation and data infrastructure for informed decisions and business use.
project_qr_title_alt: Tool for creating custom QR codes
project_qr_desc: SoftMaster’s QR Code Generator is a free online tool for creating custom QR codes for URLs. Users can choose any color, place a company logo in the center and select a transparent or white background behind the logo. The tool is simple and intuitive to use, and the generated QR code can be downloaded as a PNG file with one click. It is ideal for business cards, websites, marketing materials and digital applications.
project_qr_slogan: Custom QR codes. Created with ease.
project_dav_title_alt: Digital learning platform for alphabet & basic education
project_dav_desc: Anbani is an interactive web-based learning platform designed to teach the Georgian alphabet and basic educational content. It was developed in 2020 during school closures and allows children to learn independently with instant feedback. Users select letters, complete missing letters or words, match images, choose colors, solve simple math and geometry tasks, and immediately see their results. Correct answers are highlighted in green, incorrect ones in red with the correct solution displayed. The system counts points, generates a result overview and allows users to download a personalized PDF containing their name, date and completed exercise, making it easy to save or print. The platform is modular and can be expanded with additional content and database integration.
project_sq_desc: Squirrel is an interactive web-based game developed using PHP and JavaScript logic and running entirely in the browser. Players control a squirrel and respond to different in-game events. The project demonstrates how game mechanics, user interaction and logical processes can be combined within a web application. The game can be easily expanded and adapted for educational purposes or interactive projects.
